title: App schema + models: places + menu_items + photos

task.description: Extend app schema with places, menu_items, and photos tables with FK rules and constraints. Add strict TS model helpers to create/read/update places and manage menu items + photo metadata with stable sort by order_index.
acceptance_criteria: DB contains places table with category CHECK and rating CHECK allowing NULL or values between 1 and 5 inclusive.
DB contains menu_items table with FOREIGN KEY(place_id) REFERENCES places(id) ON DELETE CASCADE.
DB contains photos table with order_index CHECK(1..10) and UNIQUE(place_id, order_index).
photo.listPhotos(placeId) returns results sorted ascending by orderIndex (verified by creating order_index 2 then 1 and listing).

definition_of_done: All new tables are created via appSchema init.
All model functions return typed objects using camelCase fields.
